channel.title: Stremio News
channel.description: Latest news and updates from the Stremio Blog

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #76 – Fixed Stremio v4 for High Sierra and Mojave
item.description: We (finally) managed to fix the Stremio v4 build (marked as “High Sierra and up” on the downloads page), to once again work on High Sierra and Mojave MacOS versions. This was a bigger challenge than we expected as we had to rebuild an old version of our app, while the libraries that were initially…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #75 – Stremio Android TV Updated
item.description: We updated the android tv app (v1.9.12), here’s what changed: Fixed crash caused by huge images Fixed UI performance issues in player Fixed an issue that was causing audio/video desync Fixed a crash that would happen when an addon provides a malformed URL The update has already been approved on Google Play, for those that…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #74 – Stremio Android TV Updated
item.description: We updated the android tv app (v1.9.11), here’s what changed: Fixed Android TV 8 and Android TV 9 app crash after startup Fixed crash with VLC when using external subtitles Performance improvements for video player UI Updated Media3 (ExoPlayer) The update has already been approved on Google Play, for those that do not have Google…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #73 – Stremio v5 and Stremio Web Updated
item.description: We released Stremio Web v5.0.0-beta.31, here’s what changed: Translation improvements Library items behavior improvements Popup security improvements PWA styles improvements for iOS devices Copy Download URL (magnet link) visibility fix (was not working without the server running) Improve device detection for external player usage Add Infuse (macOS & iOS) & Vidhub (iOS) as external player…

item.title: MacOS Apps Updated
item.description: We released new versions of the following apps that include the new code signing certificate for MacOS:– Stremio v5 (we also managed to reduce the required MacOS version to run this app)– Stremio Service– Stremio v4.4 (High Sierra and up)– Stremio v4.4 (El Capitan – Sierra) The “Stremio Native” app for MacOS is still not…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #72 – Android TV Updated
item.description: We just released v1.9.8 of Stremio Android TV app to the Stable channel and v1.9.10 for the Beta channel. You can join the beta on your Android phone from the Stremio app page on Google Play and it will give you the option to update to Beta on the Android TV devices too. Stable v1.9.8…

item.title: Stremio on MacOS – Issues Are Now Resolved!
item.description: We have resolved the MacOS app certificate issues, if you wish to download the update from the official website you should use this downloads page link until the website cache expires for the new links to show. We have signed the Stremio v5 and Stremio v4 apps, we will also update Stremio Service in the…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #71 – Android TV Updated
item.description: We just released v1.9.4 for Android TV, here’s what changed: Fixed disabling of subtitles not respected Fixed subtitles font size Fixed delays not being reset after changing tracks Fixed player type not being remembered Fixed images of catalogs not loading on old devices Fixed readability of tracks menus items Fixed incorrect time when opening in…

item.title: Stremio on MacOS – Notice of Issues
item.description: Due to a misunderstanding with Apple, the MacOS app signing certificate has been revoked which will cause an error message to show for users when attempting to open the Stremio MacOS app. We are currently in the process of appealing Apple’s actions and expect this issue to be resolved within 1-2 weeks. Contrary to the…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #70 – Stremio Android TV Updated
item.description: We just released Stremio for Android TV v1.9.1 with the following changes: Updated player UI/UX Added a setting to display device clock on player Added an option to hide other languages from subtitles menu Added a setting to show title under catalog items Added internal player versions in settings about section Fixed missing background and…
